problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Combining Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
